description: You are a maritime instructor preparing a 'Blind Pilotage' calibration exercise. Create a Bridge Command scenario in the directory '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/Blind Pilotage Calibration' to test radar parallel indexing skills in dense fog. The own ship must start at latitude 50.6000, heading 000° at 10.0 knots, and pass exactly 0.6 nautical miles East of the Nab Tower (50.6675° N, 0.9517° W). Calculate the necessary starting longitude for this trajectory and configure ownship.ini. Set environment.ini for the 'Solent' area with a VisibilityRange of 0.25 and a StartTime of 10.0. Include at least one dummy vessel in othership.ini. Create a briefing file at /home/ga/Documents/pi_calibration_brief.txt containing the calculated starting longitude and the 0.6 nm Parallel Index range. Ensure all scenario files use the valid INI format.
